meta_title: Free Website Builder — No Skills or Code Required | Promto
meta_description: Free AI website builder. Create a professional website for free in 2 minutes. No programming, no designer needed. Start now.
og_description: Create a free website in 2 minutes with AI. No skills, no code — just describe your business.
hero_subtitle: Create a professional website for free in 2 minutes. No programming or designer required.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website you want to create...

advantages.title: Free Forever
advantages.description: Basic features are free forever. Create up to 3 websites without paying.

advantages.title: In Just 2 Minutes
advantages.description: AI instantly generates a website from your description — faster than any other method.

advantages.title: Professional Results
advantages.description: The website looks like it was made by an experienced designer — modern and polished.

advantages.title: No Hidden Fees
advantages.description: Use the builder for free as long as you need. Paid features are optional.

advantages.title: SEO Optimization Included
advantages.description: Free websites are also optimized for search engines — meta tags and loading speed are taken care of.

advantages.title: 89,000+ Users
advantages.description: More than 89,000 entrepreneurs have already created their websites through Promto.

how_it_works.title: Write a Description
how_it_works.description: Tell us about your business in a few sentences. For example: 'Beauty salon in Saint Petersburg, manicure and pedicure services.'

how_it_works.title: AI Generates Your Website
how_it_works.description: The neural network creates a ready website with texts, structure, colors, and blocks.

how_it_works.title: Edit If Needed
how_it_works.description: Change anything: texts, block order, images, colors.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Click the button — and your website is live. Share the link with your customers.

faq.question: Is the builder really free?
faq.answer: Yes. The basic plan lets you create up to 3 websites free forever. Paid plans offer more features but aren't required to get started.

faq.question: What websites can I create for free?
faq.answer: Landing pages, service websites, portfolios, sites for cafes, salons, workshops, and other businesses are all suitable. No topic restrictions.

faq.question: Will there be a watermark on my website?
faq.answer: On the free plan, there's a small Promto logo in the website footer. On paid plans, the watermark can be removed.

faq.question: Can I use my own domain for free?
faq.answer: On the free plan, websites are hosted on a Promto subdomain. Connecting a custom domain is available on paid plans.

faq.question: How quickly is a free website created?
faq.answer: The website is generated in 2 minutes — regardless of the plan. This is one of Promto's main advantages.

faq.question: Do I need experience creating websites?
faq.answer: No. The builder is designed for beginners. All you need is the ability to write in Russian and a desire to tell people about your business.

cta_mid_subtitle: Three simple steps — and your business is online. No registration required.
cta_final_title: Your Website Is Ready in 2 Minutes
cta_final_subtitle: Free, no code, no skills needed. Try it right now.
